src/lib/components/Heatmap.react.js.description:
Heatmap component wrapping MUI X Charts Pro Heatmap.
Renders a matrix visualization where color intensity represents values.
This is a Pro feature - requires MUI X Pro license key.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

licenseKey.description:
MUI X Pro license key. Required to enable Pro features without watermarks.
Get your license key from https://mui.com/x/introduction/licensing/

data.description:
Heatmap data as an array of [x, y, value] tuples.
- x: X-axis index (0-based)
- y: Y-axis index (0-based)
- value: Numeric value for the cell (mapped to color)

Example: [[0, 0, 25], [0, 1, 45], [1, 0, 30], [1, 1, 60]]

xAxis.description:
X-axis configuration object.
- data (array): Category labels for x-axis
- label (string): Axis label
- scaleType (string): Scale type, defaults to 'band' for heatmaps

yAxis.description:
Y-axis configuration object.
- data (array): Category labels for y-axis
- label (string): Axis label
- scaleType (string): Scale type, defaults to 'band' for heatmaps

colorScale.description:
Color scale configuration for mapping values to colors.

Continuous scale (interpolates between colors):
{ type: 'continuous', min: 0, max: 100, colors: ['#e3f2fd', '#1565c0'] }

Piecewise scale (discrete color bands):
{ type: 'piecewise', thresholds: [20, 40, 60, 80],
  colors: ['#color1', '#color2', '#color3', '#color4', '#color5'] }

Note: For piecewise, you need n+1 colors for n thresholds.

width.description:
Chart width in pixels. If not specified, the chart expands to fill
the available space.

height.description: Chart height in pixels. Default is 400.

margin.description: Chart margins in pixels. Object with top, right, bottom, left keys.

hideLegend.description: If true, the color legend is hidden.

tooltip.description:
Tooltip configuration.
- trigger (string): 'item' to show on cell hover, 'none' to disable

highlightScope.description:
Highlight scope configuration for cell highlighting behavior.
- highlight: 'item' or 'none'
- fade: 'global' or 'none'

cellStyle.description:
Custom cell style. Use 'rounded' for default rounded corners with gap,
or provide an object for detailed configuration:
- gap (number): Spacing between cells in pixels (default: 4)
- borderRadius (number): Corner radius in pixels (default: 10)
- showValue (boolean): Display value text in cells (default: true)
- fontSize (number): Font size for value text (default: 12)
- fontWeight (number): Font weight for value text (default: 500)
- textColor (string): Color for value text (default: '#ffffff')

slotProps.description: Props passed to internal slot components for customization.

highlightedItem.description:
Currently highlighted item. Read-only output property updated when
the user hovers over a cell.

clickData.description:
Data from the most recent click event. Read-only output property.
Contains x, y, value, seriesId, and timestamp.

n_clicks.description: Number of times the chart has been clicked. Increments on each click event.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.

src/lib/components/LineChart.react.js.description:
LineChart component wrapping MUI X Charts Pro with composition API.
Renders interactive line charts with support for multiple series,
customizable axes, tooltips, click event callbacks, and Pro features
like zoom, pan, and zoom slider.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

licenseKey.description:
MUI X Pro license key. Required to enable Pro features like zoom/pan
without watermarks. Get your license key from https://mui.com/x/introduction/licensing/

series.description:
Array of series configurations. Each series represents a line in the chart.
Each series object can have:
- id (string): Unique identifier for the series
- data (array of numbers): Y-axis values, supports null for gaps
- label (string): Label shown in legend and tooltip
- color (string): Custom color for this series
- area (boolean): Fill area under the line
- stack (string): Stack identifier for stacked area charts
- curve (string): Interpolation method - 'linear', 'monotoneX', 'monotoneY',
  'natural', 'step', 'stepBefore', 'stepAfter', 'catmullRom', 'bumpX', 'bumpY'
- showMark (boolean): Whether to show data point markers
- connectNulls (boolean): Whether to bridge gaps across null values
- yAxisId (string): ID of the y-axis to use for this series (for biaxial charts)
- xAxisId (string): ID of the x-axis to use for this series

xAxis.description:
X-axis configuration. Array of axis config objects.
Each axis object can have:
- data (array): X-axis values
- label (string): Axis label
- scaleType (string): 'band', 'point', 'linear', 'log', 'time'
- position (string): 'top' or 'bottom'
- id (string): Axis identifier for referencing in series and zoom
- zoom (boolean or object): Enable zoom on this axis. Can be true or object with:
  - minStart (number): Minimum start position (0-100)
  - maxEnd (number): Maximum end position (0-100)
  - minSpan (number): Minimum zoom span
  - maxSpan (number): Maximum zoom span
  - step (number): Zoom step size
  - panning (boolean): Enable panning
  - filterMode (string): 'keep' or 'discard'
  - slider (object): Slider config with { enabled: true }

yAxis.description:
Y-axis configuration. Array of axis config objects.
Each axis object can have:
- label (string): Axis label
- min (number): Minimum domain value
- max (number): Maximum domain value
- width (number): Width allocated for axis
- position (string): 'left' or 'right'
- id (string): Axis identifier for referencing in series
- zoom (boolean or object): Enable zoom on this axis (same options as xAxis)

height.description: Chart height in pixels. Default is 400.

width.description:
Chart width in pixels. If not specified, the chart expands to fill
the available space.

margin.description: Chart margins in pixels. Object with top, right, bottom, left keys.

grid.description: Grid configuration. Object with vertical and horizontal boolean keys.

colors.description: Array of colors for the series palette.

hideLegend.description: If true, the legend is hidden.

tooltip.description:
Tooltip configuration. Object with trigger key.
- trigger (string): 'item', 'axis', or 'none'

loading.description: If true, a loading overlay is displayed.

zoom.description:
Controlled zoom state for the chart. Array of objects with:
- axisId (string): The axis identifier
- start (number): Start position (0-100)
- end (number): End position (0-100)

initialZoom.description:
Initial zoom state for uncontrolled mode. Array of objects with:
- axisId (string): The axis identifier
- start (number): Start position (0-100)
- end (number): End position (0-100)

showSlider.description:
If true, shows a zoom slider below the chart for easy zoom control.
The slider allows users to select a range and pan through the data.

zoomData.description:
Current zoom state. Read-only output property updated when zoom changes.
Array of objects with axisId, start, and end values.

clickData.description:
Data from the most recent click event. Read-only output property.
Contains type ('axis', 'mark', 'line', 'area'), relevant IDs/values,
and timestamp.

n_clicks.description: Number of times the chart has been clicked. Increments on each click event.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.

src/lib/components/PieChart.react.js.description:
PieChart component wrapping MUI X Charts PieChart.
Renders pie and donut charts with customizable arcs, labels, and interactions.
Supports single series (via data prop) or multiple series (via series prop) for nested pies.
This is a free feature - no MUI X Pro license required.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

data.description:
Pie chart data as an array of objects (for single series).
Each object should have:
- id (number/string): Unique identifier for the slice
- value (number): The numeric value (required)
- label (string): Display label for the slice
- color (string): Optional color override for this slice

Example: [
  { id: 0, value: 35, label: 'Marketing' },
  { id: 1, value: 25, label: 'Engineering', color: '#1976d2' },
]

Note: Use either 'data' for single series or 'series' for multiple series (nested pies).

series.description:
Array of series configurations for multi-series/nested pie charts.
Each series can have its own data, geometry, and styling.
When provided, the 'data' prop and individual geometry props are ignored.

Example for nested pie:
[
  {
    data: innerRingData,
    innerRadius: 0,
    outerRadius: 80,
    cornerRadius: 3,
    highlightScope: { fade: 'global', highlight: 'item' },
  },
  {
    data: outerRingData,
    innerRadius: 90,
    outerRadius: 120,
    cornerRadius: 3,
    highlightScope: { fade: 'global', highlight: 'item' },
  },
]

width.description:
Chart width in pixels. If not specified, the chart expands to fill
the available space.

height.description: Chart height in pixels. Default is 300.

innerRadius.description:
Inner radius of the pie in pixels or percentage string.
Set to a value > 0 to create a donut chart.
Examples: 50, '50%', '40%'

outerRadius.description:
Outer radius of the pie in pixels or percentage string.
Examples: 100, '80%'

paddingAngle.description: Gap between arcs in degrees. Creates visual separation between slices.

cornerRadius.description: Corner radius of the arcs in pixels. Rounds the corners of each slice.

startAngle.description:
Start angle of the first arc in degrees. Default is 0 (3 o'clock position).
Use -90 for 12 o'clock start position.

endAngle.description:
End angle of the last arc in degrees. Default is 360 (full circle).
Use 90 with startAngle=-90 for a half-pie/gauge chart.

cx.description:
X position of the pie center. Can be pixels or percentage string.
Default is '50%' (centered).

cy.description:
Y position of the pie center. Can be pixels or percentage string.
Default is '50%' (centered).

arcLabel.description:
Type of label to display on arcs.
- 'value': Shows the numeric value
- 'label': Shows the label text
- 'formattedValue': Shows formatted value

arcLabelMinAngle.description:
Minimum arc angle in degrees required to display a label.
Prevents labels from appearing on very small slices.

colors.description:
Array of colors to use for the pie slices.
If not provided, uses the default MUI color palette.
Example: ['#1976d2', '#dc004e', '#ff9800', '#4caf50']

hideLegend.description: If true, the legend is hidden.

margin.description: Chart margins in pixels. Object with top, right, bottom, left keys.

highlightScope.description:
Highlight scope configuration for slice highlighting behavior.
- highlight: 'item' or 'none'
- fade: 'global' or 'none'

Example: { highlight: 'item', fade: 'global' }

tooltip.description:
Tooltip configuration.
- trigger (string): 'item' to show on slice hover, 'none' to disable

skipAnimation.description: If true, disables chart animations. Also respects prefers-reduced-motion.

clickData.description:
Data from the most recent click event. Read-only output property.
Contains id, dataIndex, value, label, and timestamp.

n_clicks.description: Number of times the chart has been clicked. Increments on each click event.

highlightedItem.description:
Currently highlighted item. Read-only output property updated when
the user hovers over a slice.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.

src/lib/components/SparklineChart.react..description:
SparklineChart component wrapping MUI X Charts SparkLineChart.
Renders compact, inline charts perfect for dashboards, tables, and KPI cards.
This is a Community feature - no license key required.

Supports both controlled and uncontrolled highlight states for interactive
dashboards where hovering on a sparkline updates other components.

id.description: The ID used to identify this component in Dash callbacks.

data.description:
Array of numeric values to display in the sparkline.
This is the primary data for the chart.

plotType.description:
Type of plot to render.
- 'line': Renders a line chart (default)
- 'bar': Renders a bar chart

width.description:
Chart width in pixels. If not specified, the chart will
expand to fill the available space.

height.description: Chart height in pixels. Default is 36 for compact inline display.

color.description:
Single color for the sparkline. Can be any valid CSS color string.
Example: '#1976d2', 'rgb(25, 118, 210)', 'blue'

colors.description: Array of colors for the sparkline. Use this for multi-color configurations.

area.description: If true, fills the area under the line. Only applies when plotType is 'line'.

curve.description:
Curve interpolation method for line charts.
Options: 'linear', 'monotoneX', 'monotoneY', 'natural', 'step',
'stepBefore', 'stepAfter', 'catmullRom', 'bumpX', 'bumpY'

showTooltip.description: If true, shows a tooltip on hover displaying the value.

showHighlight.description:
If true, shows a visual highlight on the hovered data point.
For line charts, shows a dot. For bar charts, shows a band.

margin.description:
Chart margins in pixels. Object with top, right, bottom, left keys.
Default is { top: 5, right: 5, bottom: 5, left: 5 }.

xAxis.description:
X-axis configuration object. Unlike LineChart, this is a single object,
not an array. The axis is hidden by default for compact display.
- id (string): Axis identifier for controlled highlighting
- data (array): X-axis labels/values
- scaleType (string): Scale type

yAxis.description:
Y-axis configuration object. Unlike LineChart, this is a single object,
not an array. The axis is hidden by default for compact display.

axisHighlight.description:
Axis highlight configuration. Controls how the axis is highlighted on hover.
- x: 'line' | 'band' | 'none' - highlight style for x-axis
- y: 'line' | 'band' | 'none' - highlight style for y-axis

slotProps.description:
Props passed to internal slot components for customization.
- lineHighlight: { r: number } - radius of the highlight dot
- tooltip: tooltip configuration

clipAreaOffset.description:
Offset for the clip area to prevent cutting off elements at edges.
Object with top, right, bottom, left keys (in pixels).

baseline.description:
Baseline for area charts. Determines where the area fill starts.
- 'min': fills from minimum value (default)
- 'max': fills from maximum value
- number: fills from a specific value

strokeWidth.description:
Stroke width for the line in pixels. Only applies when plotType is 'line'.
Default is 2. Higher values create thicker lines.

disableClipping.description:
If true, disables clipping of the chart content.
Useful when elements extend beyond the chart boundaries.

highlightedIndex.description:
Controlled highlight index. Set this to programmatically highlight
a specific data point. Requires xAxis.id to be set.

highlightedItem.description:
Currently highlighted item. Read-only output property updated when
the user hovers over a data point (requires showHighlight=true).
Contains the data index of the highlighted point.

hoverIndex.description:
Index of the currently hovered data point. Read-only output.
Use this to sync hover state with other components.

hoverValue.description:
Value at the currently hovered data point. Read-only output.
Use this to display the hovered value in other components.

n_hovers.description: Number of hover events. Increments each time a data point is hovered.

setProps.description:
Dash-assigned callback that should be called to report property changes
to Dash, to make them available for callbacks.
